name: kursorganizer-wp-plugin
description: Release-Tooling fuer das KursOrganizer X WordPress-Plugin

scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && git add kursorganizer-wp-plugin.php README.md
scripts.postversion: git push origin HEAD && git push origin --tags && echo '\n✓ Tag gepusht. GitHub Actions erstellt jetzt das Release: https://github.com/triias/kursorganizer-wp-plugin/actions'
